items.name: head skull
items.description: A small, spooky skull - perfect for Halloween décor or as a quirky companion perched on your shoulder. Don't worry, it won't bite. Still... there's something oddly unsettling about those teeth.

items.name: Not nice - Text Bubble
items.description:
Add a playful twist to your holiday greetings with this chat bubble! Decorated with sparkling stars, a festive ornament, and a gleaming gold star, it's perfect for those who are proud of their not nice side. Whether you're joking around with friends or embracing your fun holiday spirit, this bubble brings a touch of humor to the season.
